body_txt: Come on, guys! Let me describe The Team Wannabe here! I can be a great troper! A character wants to be part of some group, whether a gang, club, superhero team, or something else. The character will follow the team around constantly to the point of stalking them. They will hang around wherever the team hangs around. They will keep begging and pleading until they get in. Sometimes they even might , but usually they just stay the wannabe since Status Quo Is God . In a few cases they might get spurned enough to start to resent the group that rejected them, becoming a villain (or hero, if the group turns out to be evil ). Or the wannabe might be so determined to gain membership that they refuse to take no for an answer, and make schemes to weasel their way onto the team, or even try forcing the team to let them join. The Tagalong Kid or Fanboy / Fangirl is often this. An Ascended Fanboy is often a former wannabe. A Sister Trope to Leader Wannabe . Compare Never Be a Hero , I Just Want to Be Special , I Just Want to Have Friends , Hero with an F in Good , Heroic Wannabe , The Chosen Wannabe . Contrast The Drag-Along . Compare/Contrast Jumped at the Call , Honorary True Companion , 11th-Hour Ranger .
